import type { TableBuilderConfig, TableRow } from "../../components/tables/types";

export interface Row extends TableRow {
  "orderId": string;
  "customer": string;
  "date": string;
  "total": number;
  "items": number;
  "status": string;
}


export const tableConfig: TableBuilderConfig = {
  "title": "Orders",
  "description": "Track and manage customer orders.",
  "direction": "ltr",
  "density": "compact",
  "pageSize": 15,
  "sortMode": "client",
  "paginationMode": "client",
  "groupBy": "status",
  "expandableLayout": "details",
  "expandableIconStyle": "chevron",
  "expandableIconPosition": "first",
  "paginationLayout": "full",
  "pageSizeOptions": [
    5,
    10,
    20,
    50,
    100
  ],
  "virtualRowHeight": 44,
  "virtualMaxHeight": 520,
  "enableSearch": true,
  "enablePagination": true,
  "enableRowSelection": true,
  "enableDnD": false,
  "enableColumnVisibility": true,
  "enableExport": true,
  "enableStriped": false,
  "enableHover": true,
  "enableBordered": false,
  "enableStickyHeader": false,
  "enableExpandableRows": false,
  "enableInlineEdit": false,
  "enableBulkActions": true,
  "enableColumnResize": false,
  "enableMultiSort": false,
  "enableColumnFilters": true,
  "enableRowGrouping": true,
  "enableAggregation": true,
  "enableFooter": true,
  "columns": [
    {
      "id": "c1",
      "key": "orderId",
      "label": "Order #",
      "type": "text",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left"
    },
    {
      "id": "c2",
      "key": "customer",
      "label": "Customer",
      "type": "avatar",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left"
    },
    {
      "id": "c3",
      "key": "date",
      "label": "Date",
      "type": "date",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left"
    },
    {
      "id": "c4",
      "key": "total",
      "label": "Total",
      "type": "currency",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "right",
      "format": "$",
      "aggregation": "sum",
      "footerLabel": "Total"
    },
    {
      "id": "c5",
      "key": "items",
      "label": "Items",
      "type": "number",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "center",
      "aggregation": "sum",
      "footerLabel": "Total"
    },
    {
      "id": "c6",
      "key": "status",
      "label": "Status",
      "type": "badge",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "groupable": true,
      "badgeVariants": {
        "Pending": "outline",
        "Processing": "secondary",
        "Shipped": "default",
        "Delivered": "default",
        "Cancelled": "outline"
      }
    },
    {
      "id": "c7",
      "key": "actions",
      "label": "",
      "type": "actions",
      "sortable": false,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "right"
    }
  ]
} as const satisfies TableBuilderConfig;
